title: cyperus tacnensis var. tacnensis
intro: Cyperus tacnensis var. tacnensis, commonly known as Tacna sedge, is a plant species belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae) and is native to Peru. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include relief from fever, cough, and cold, as well as its use in treating respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction for medicinal use, although specific herbal preparations and dosages may vary depending on the intended application.
